meta.prompt_summary: Balanced for fullstack roles emphasizing React, Node.js, MongoDB, Prisma, testing, and end-to-end ownership.

headline: Fullstack Developer | React, Node.js, MongoDB, Prisma
summary: Production-oriented fullstack developer experienced in delivering multi-tenant applications across frontend architecture, backend data modeling, testing, and deployment.
Ships React and TypeScript user experiences alongside Node.js, MongoDB, Prisma, and REST-based integrations across IoT, LMS, HMS, and ERP platforms.

bullets: Built production-grade fullstack features across 6+ concurrent platforms spanning IoT, LMS, HMS, HRIS, Inventory, and Order Management in an Agile delivery environment.
Developed React and TypeScript interfaces plus reusable component systems adopted across 8+ company-wide projects.
Designed MongoDB and Prisma data models that aligned frontend-backend contracts, supported team PR reviews, and strengthened shared platform consistency.
Managed CI/CD workflows through GitHub Actions with Firebase deployment and wrote Jest unit and integration tests that reduced post-release bug reports by about 25%.
Integrated IoT hardware endpoints into a centralized React dashboard for real-time control and monitoring across 50+ connected devices with sub-500ms response latency.
Delivered 3 responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap, including the company's main website.
Worked with the development team under SDLC practices and gained foundational experience in Git-based collaboration.

projects.name: ALMA (Alternative Learning Management App)
projects.subtitle: Multi-tenant LMS with authentication, assessments, and academic workflows
bullets: Architected a multi-tenant LMS serving 3 organizational tenants with JWT-based authentication and role-based access for admins, instructors, and 200+ student accounts.
Built assessment, scoring, analytics, attendance, and gradebook features for 15+ instructors across 40+ classes.

projects.name: HMS Reservation System
projects.subtitle: Hotel reservation workflow from search to checkout
bullets: Built a multi-tenant hotel management system for rooms, pricing, users, and reservations with tenant-isolated data architecture.
Implemented room configuration, dynamic pricing rules, and reservation lifecycle flows from search to checkout.

projects.name: ERP Platform Suite (Uzaro Solutions)
projects.subtitle: Connected enterprise modules for HRIS, inventory, order management, and supply chain
bullets: Developed HRIS, inventory, order management, and supporting enterprise modules inside a multi-tenant platform architecture.
Handled high-volume product areas including 6,000+ employee records in HRIS and GS1-compliant inventory workflows with barcode and SKU tracking.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
bullets: Algolympics Champion - 1st Place, campus-wide algorithm programming contest (2nd Year).
Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Object-Oriented Programming.
